mapper.insert: INSERT INTO equipment_bookings (user_id, borrow_date, time_slots, status, purpose, contact_info, related_venue_booking_id, version) VALUES (#{userId}, #{borrowDate}, #{timeSlots}, #{status}, #{purpose}, #{contactInfo}, #{relatedVenueBookingId}, 1)
mapper.update: UPDATE equipment_bookings SET borrow_date = #{borrowDate}, time_slots = #{timeSlots}, status = #{status}, purpose = #{purpose}, contact_info = #{contactInfo}, related_venue_booking_id = #{relatedVenueBookingId}, reviewed_by = NULL, reviewed_at = NULL, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO equipment_booking_items (equipment_booking_id, equipment_id, quantity) VALUES (#{equipmentBookingId}, #{equipmentId}, #{quantity})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, borrow_date, time_slots, status, purpose, contact_info, related_venue_booking_id, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, version, created_at, updated_at FROM equipment_bookings WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, equipment_booking_id, equipment_id, quantity FROM equipment_booking_items WHERE equipment_booking_id = #{bookingId} ORDER BY id ASC

SELECT ebi.id, ebi.equipment_id, e.name AS equipment_name, ebi.quantity FROM equipment_booking_items ebi INNER JOIN equipments e ON ebi.equipment_id = e.id WHERE ebi.equipment_booking_id = #{bookingId} ORDER BY ebi.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM equipment_bookings eb WHERE eb.user_id = #{userId} AND eb.status != 4

SELECT id, user_id, borrow_date, time_slots, status, purpose, contact_info, related_venue_booking_id, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, version, created_at, updated_at FROM equipment_bookings eb WHERE eb.user_id = #{userId} AND eb.status != 4
ORDER BY eb.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM equipment_bookings eb WHERE eb.status != 4

SELECT id, user_id, borrow_date, time_slots, status, purpose, contact_info, related_venue_booking_id, reviewed_by, reviewed_at, version, created_at, updated_at FROM equipment_bookings eb WHERE eb.status != 4
ORDER BY eb.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
mapper.update: UPDATE equipment_bookings SET status = #{newStatus}, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{oldVersion}

UPDATE equipment_bookings SET status = 3, reviewed_by = #{reviewedBy}, reviewed_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE status = 1 AND id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(ebi.quantity), 0) FROM equipment_booking_items ebi INNER JOIN equipment_bookings eb ON ebi.equipment_booking_id = eb.id WHERE ebi.equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND eb.borrow_date = #{borrowDate} AND eb.status = 2 AND (eb.time_slots & #{hourMask}) != 0 AND (#{excludeEquipmentBookingId} IS NULL OR eb.id != #{excludeEquipmentBookingId})
